case_title: RONALD BROOKS VS. A AND C AUTO CLINIC INC.

docket_entries.description: AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,524.52 FILED BY BROOKS, RONALD AS TO DEFENDANT A AND C AUTO CLINIC INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-21-2022 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,524.52 FILED BY BROOKS, RONALD AS TO DEFENDANT A AND C AUTO CLINIC INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-21-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FRANK TRAN, PRESIDENT. FILED BY DEFENDANT A AND C AUTO CLINIC INC.
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF, AMENDING CLAIM TO CHANGE THE DEFENDANTS NAME FROM A AND C AUTO INC TO A AND C AUTO CLINIC INC. ALSO TO CHANGE WORDAGE IN DESCRIPTION. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROOKS, RONALD

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-21-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-21-2022 BY JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. PLAINTIFF RONALD BROOKS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT A AND C AUTO CLINIC INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY FRANK TRAN, OWNER. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF PRESENTS PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT DONE ON 11-4-2022 WHICH HAS NOT BEEN FILED WITH THE COURT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROOKS, RONALD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT A AND C AUTO CLINIC INC. $1,627.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,677.00, PLAINTIFF NOT ENTITLED TO MUFFLER CATALYTIC CONVERTER EXPENSES & REFUND OF $150.00 INSPECTION FEE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT A AND C AUTO CLINIC INC.
